calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HELENA NONG's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment.

Defendant Helena Nong's motion to set aside default judgment is off calendar as moot pursuant to the stipulation to set aside default and default judgment filed by Plaintiff Amco Insurance Company on May 20, 2019. The Court will sign the proposed stipulated order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Jan-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default Judgment At Time Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jay W. Smith, Esq. appeared for plaintiff AMCO Insurance Company, an Iowa corporation.
Gretchen Goritz, a Claims Adjuster for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendants Helena Nong or Gary Bolden Liu.
Defaults were entered against defendants Nog & Liu on June 1, 2017.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants Brian Tran and Bee, Inc. were entered on July 7, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 20, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff AMCO Insurance Company, an Iowa corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Helena Nong and Gary Bolden Liu, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $249,063.97.
Prejudgment Interest - $50,673.36
Costs - $628.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $300,365.83.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
